Bus Timings

Discover the F26 Bus Timings Equiti Metro Landside to Onpassive Terminus

October 10, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

This route offers a reliable option for daily travel needs and connects various key stops along the way.

Bus Timings

At the Equiti Metro Landside departure point, the F26 bus operates throughout the day at regular intervals. Services start from early morning and continue until late evening, ensuring frequent and accessible transportation options for passengers commuting within the Al Quoz area.

Bus F26 Timetable

To view the full schedule, you can visit the official RTA website or follow this link to access the F26 Bus Timings.

Bus Route

The F26 route includes stops at the following locations:

  1. Equiti Metro Landside

  2. Gold & Diamond Park

  3. Collapse

  4. Falaknaz

  5. Technical Resources Est

  6. Nabooda Cars

  7. Quoz, Gargash

  8. Cemex RMC Topmix

  9. Azzani Ready Mix

  10. Dubai Center Driving School

  11. Classic Crystal

  12. ETA SwitchGear Manufacturing

  13. ETA Profiles

  14. Al Quoz Mall

  15. Al Quoz, Al Shamsi Steel Manufacturing Co

  16. Emirates Glass

  17. T. Choithram Stores

  18. Al Qeaim Public Kitchen

  19. Al Habtoor Engineering

  1. Habtoor Equipment Corporation

  2. National Cement Corporation, Staff Accomodation

  3. 7 Up Staff Accommodation

  4. Qumaish Cont, Labour Camp

  5. Ahmadya Cont., Labour Camp

  6. Speedwell Decor

  7. Al Quoz Bus Station · 8

  8. Queen Palace Factory

  9. Galadari Printing & Publishing

  10. Onpassive Metro Landside

  11. Onpassive Terminus

Bus F26 Station Overview

Equiti Metro Landside

The Equiti Metro Landside bus station is situated adjacent to the Equiti Metro Station, enhancing connectivity between bus and metro services. Located in a bustling area, this station serves as a critical transit point for passengers traveling to and from the metro, offering modern amenities such as comfortable seating, ticketing services, and real-time schedule updates.

Its integration with the metro system allows for seamless transfers, making it a convenient stop for daily commuters and travelers heading to nearby commercial and residential areas.

Onpassive Terminus

The Onpassive Terminus is a key bus station located in the vicinity of Onpassive’s business operations.

Its location supports easy access to the Onpassive offices and surrounding businesses, providing a practical transit solution for those working in or visiting the area. The station plays an important role in facilitating transportation within the business district and connecting passengers to other parts of the city.

Bus Ticket Price

The bus ticket price for the F26 route is budget-friendly (typically around AED 3-5), offering an economical way for commuters to travel between Equiti Metro Landside and Onpassive Terminus. Prices are affordable and cater to both regular commuters and occasional travelers.

Bus Booking

Bus tickets for the F26 route can be purchased directly from the bus driver upon boarding. While specific online booking options may not be available, passengers can check schedules and plan their journeys using official Dubai transport apps or websites.

Journey Experience

As the route continues, passengers can observe Dubai’s modern infrastructure alongside quieter residential neighborhoods, showcasing the city’s rapid development. The trip concludes at Onpassive Terminus, an area within Dubai’s growing tech and business sector, reflecting the city’s focus on innovation. Despite the length of the journey, the F26 route offers a unique glimpse into both the dynamic city life and the expanding business landscape of Dubai.

Traveling with Careem

With the Careem app, travelers can easily reach Onpassive Terminus, the endpoint of the F26 bus route starting from Equiti Metro Landside. This route spans through essential stops like Gold & Diamond Park, Technical Resources Est, and Al Quoz Bus Station · 8, catering primarily to commuters within Al Quoz’s industrial and commercial hub. Offering a cost-effective fare ranging from AED 25 to 29, the F26 bus provides a convenient transportation option for daily commuters and travelers navigating Dubai’s dynamic cityscape.

This comprehensive guide to the F26 bus route highlights its importance in facilitating travel within Al Quoz, providing essential connectivity to key commercial and residential areas. Whether for work or leisure, the F26 bus offers a convenient and cost-effective transportation solution in Dubai.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: October 10, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
